semantic.role: Pipeline stage task orchestrating post-commit derivation of views, aggregations, and reverse indices.
responsibilities: Orchestrates sequential execution of AggregationTask, ReverseIndexingTask, and ViewDerivationTask via TaskRunner.
Clears stale view artifacts before derivation using ViewService.clearViewArtifacts.
Iterates over VIEW_DEFINITIONS to derive per-view artifacts.
Conditionally activates the view derivation layer based on the experimentalViewLayer flag passed to the constructor.
Acts as the post-commit stage in the ArchSpine pipeline, consuming CommitStageOutput and producing void.
outOfScope: Does not handle CLI command parsing or unrelated service orchestration.
Does not define the sub-tasks (AggregationTask, ReverseIndexingTask, ViewDerivationTask) themselves.
Does not manage configuration or service registration.
invariants: Derivation pipeline stage execution order must be maintained: aggregation before reverse indexing before view derivation.
View artifacts must be cleared via ViewService before any derivation begins.
The experimentalViewLayer constructor parameter gates whether the view derivation step is executed.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Implements the post-commit derivation stage as part of the ArchSpine pipeline, coordinating sub-tasks and service calls to produce derived artifacts after each commit.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: ArchSpine v1.0.0 — Architectural Governance & Semantic Layer for the AI Era

semantic.driftReason: New constructor parameter experimentalViewLayer introduces conditional activation of view derivation, not captured in previous contract.

English.role: Pipeline stage task orchestrating post-commit derivation of views, aggregations, and reverse indices.
responsibilities: Orchestrates sequential execution of AggregationTask, ReverseIndexingTask, and ViewDerivationTask via TaskRunner.
Clears stale view artifacts before derivation using ViewService.clearViewArtifacts.
Iterates over VIEW_DEFINITIONS to derive per-view artifacts.
Conditionally activates the view derivation layer based on the experimentalViewLayer flag passed to the constructor.
Acts as the post-commit stage in the ArchSpine pipeline, consuming CommitStageOutput and producing void.
outOfScope: Does not handle CLI command parsing or unrelated service orchestration.
Does not define the sub-tasks (AggregationTask, ReverseIndexingTask, ViewDerivationTask) themselves.
Does not manage configuration or service registration.

Simplified Chinese.role: 管道阶段任务，负责编排提交后视图、聚合和反向索引的派生。
responsibilities: 通过 TaskRunner 依次执行 AggregationTask、ReverseIndexingTask 和 ViewDerivationTask。
在派生前使用 ViewService.clearViewArtifacts 清除过期的视图工件。
遍历 VIEW_DEFINITIONS 为每个视图派生对应的工件。
根据构造函数传入的 experimentalViewLayer 标志条件性地激活视图派生层。
作为 ArchSpine 管道中的提交后阶段，消费 CommitStageOutput 并返回 void。
outOfScope: 不处理命令行解析或无关的服务编排。
不管理配置或服务注册。
